hero.title: Apply to Join MIRYA
hero.description: Share your experience, skills, and background so we can understand how you fit into our team. Fill out the form below to submit your application.

motivation.q2: Share a project or achievement you're most proud of
motivation.q3: What is your expected yearly salary for the role?
motivation.q4: Tell us briefly about any experience working on automation or AI

hero-section.title: Explore Ideas, Trends and Deep Research
hero-section.description: Elevate your thinking with expert articles, AI-driven analysis, and the latest research tools wherever content creation meets innovation.
